description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by dense rows of mature trees, creating a secluded and private atmosphere. The structure features a complex, multi-hipped roof with several intersecting sections, and a prominent covered entryway supported by columns. The exterior appears to be finished in a light, neutral color, likely stucco or painted wood, with multiple windows distributed across the facades. A paved driveway leads up to the main entrance, and there is a visible garage or carport integrated into the design. The landscaping is formal, with trees arranged in neat, linear patterns along the perimeter of the property. The overall setting suggests a suburban or upscale neighborhood context.
description: A single-story bungalow with a multi-hipped roof, surrounded by dense, orderly rows of trees and featuring a prominent entryway and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and symmetrical tree arrangement framing the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the linear tree rows and the side elevation of the bungalow, with less detail on the entryway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, more windows, and the dense tree coverage behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage/carport area and the continuation of the tree rows along the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
